name: Status Request
desc: Requests the server's status (MOTD, player count, favicon, protocol version). Empty packet with no payload.
encoding: Completely empty packet — just the 0x00 packet ID
notes: Sent immediately after C00Handshake when the nextState is STATUS (1). The server responds with S00PacketServerInfo (JSON status). Used by the multiplayer server list screen (OldServerPinger.java).

modules.name: ServerScanner
modules.purpose: Send server list pings for IP scanning.
